login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your email address and password to access account.
login.maintenanceModeEnabled: Maintenance mode is active. Only administrators can sign in.
login.mfaHint: Multi-factor verification is enabled on your account. Enter the code sent to your email.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Don't have an account? Create your account, it takes less than a minute.
register.passwordStrengthHint: Use 8+ characters with letters, numbers & symbols.
register.termsOfServiceAgreement: I accept the Terms of Service
register.successMessage: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to your email address.
register.codeExpired: Code expired. Please request a new one.
register.codeResent: A new verification code has been sent.
register.maintenanceMessage: Registration is temporarily unavailable while maintenance mode is active.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a 6-digit code to reset your password.

confirmEmail.title: Email Verification
confirmEmail.subtitle: Enter your email address and the 6-digit verification code we sent.
confirmEmail.codeResent: A new verification code has been sent.
confirmEmail.codeExpiredMessage: This verification code has expired. Request a new code to continue.
confirmEmail.loginContinueHint: Enter the 6-digit code to continue signing in. If it did not arrive, resend it.
confirmEmail.tokenVerificationInProgress: We are verifying your email link...
confirmEmail.successMessage: Your email address has been successfully verified! Thank you for joining the Eskineria family. Your account is now fully active and you can access all features.
confirmEmail.alreadyConfirmedMessage: Your email address has already been verified. No further action is needed, you can continue to enjoy Eskineria.
confirmEmail.notRequiredMessage: Email verification is currently not required. You can sign in directly.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.codeSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email address.
resetPassword.codeResent: A new reset code has been sent.
resetPassword.codeExpiredMessage: This reset code has expired. Request a new code to continue.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully updated! You can now log in.
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: Start from the forgot password page to receive your password reset code.

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms of service and privacy policy to continue.
errors.requestTimeout: Request timeout. Please check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: Session expired or invalid. Please login again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

sessionTimeout.title: Session Timeout Warning
sessionTimeout.message: You have been inactive for a while. Your session will expire in {{seconds}} seconds.

selectRole.title: Select Your Role
selectRole.subtitle: Choose the role you want to use to continue. You will be able to perform actions based on your permissions in this role during this session.

captcha.title: Human Verification
captcha.subtitle: Too many requests were detected. Please solve the captcha to continue.
captcha.loadFailed: Captcha challenge could not be loaded.
captcha.challengeMissing: Captcha challenge is missing. Please request a new one.
captcha.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please complete captcha verification.

hero.title: A cleaner sign-in experience with security built in.
hero.subtitle: From login to OTP verification and account recovery, every step follows the same reliable flow.

complianceReview.title: Updated agreements require your approval
complianceReview.subtitle: Before you continue, review and approve the latest required legal documents for your account.
complianceReview.notice: We published a new version of one or more required agreements. You need to approve the latest version once before continuing.
complianceReview.acceptLabel: I have reviewed and accept the {{document}} v{{version}}
complianceReview.validation: Review and approve each required document to continue.
complianceReview.acceptError: We could not save your approvals. Please try again.

cookieNotice.title: Cookie Notice
cookieNotice.message: We use cookies to keep the site secure, improve performance and understand usage.

common.internalServerError: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
common.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
common.confirmProceed: Are you sure you want to proceed?

401.title: Unauthorized Access
401.message: You do not have the necessary permissions to view this page. If you believe this is an error, please contact your administrator.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.message: The page you're looking for can't be found. It may be missing or the URL is incorrect.

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.message: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later or contact support if the issue persists.

maintenance.title: We'll Be Back Soon!
maintenance.description: Our system is currently undergoing scheduled maintenance to improve your experience. Thank you for your patience.

topbar.role_switch_subtitle: Select the role you want to continue with.
topbar.no_other_roles: There are no other roles available to switch.

customizer.title: Admin Customizer
customizer.subtitle: Easily configure layout, styles, and preferences for your admin interface.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.email_readonly_notice: Email changes are locked in profile settings for security. Use a dedicated verified flow if you need to update it.

mfa.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
mfa.enabled_desc: MFA is enabled for your account.
mfa.disabled_desc: MFA is not enabled for your account yet.
mfa.feature_disabled: MFA feature is disabled in this environment.
mfa.action_hint: Use the action button to change MFA state.
mfa.enable_confirm: To enable MFA, confirm with your current password.
mfa.disable_confirm: To disable MFA, confirm with your current password.
mfa.social_info: Since you are logged in via a social network, we need to send a verification code to your email address to confirm your action.
mfa.code_sent_info: A verification code has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox.

profile.bio_placeholder: Hi, I am {{name}}. I am glad to be a member of this community.
profile.image_format_note: Allowed JPG, GIF or PNG. Max size of 800kB

identity.title: Identity Management
identity.manage_roles_description: Manage roles for smoother operations and secure access.
identity.full_access: Full access to all system features.

localization.title: Localization
localization.subtitle: Manage application translations for all supported languages.
localization.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this translation?
localization.draft_publish_enabled_hint: Draft/Publish workflow is enabled. Save operations create drafts until published.
localization.missing_banner_desc: These keys were requested at runtime but no translation value was found.
localization.source_culture_desc: Select the base language to copy keys from.
localization.target_culture_desc: Enter the code for the new language (e.g., es-ES, fr-FR).
localization.target_culture_required: Please enter a target culture code.
localization.clone_confirm: This will copy all keys from {source} to {target}. Continue?
localization.delete_language_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete language {culture}? This will remove all its translation keys.
localization.select_culture_to_delete: Please select a culture to delete.

system_settings.title: System Settings
system_settings.subtitle: Manage global authentication switches for the application.
system_settings.docs_intro: This tab explains what each setting group controls and how it affects system behavior.
system_settings.docs_registration_policy_desc: Invitation, domain allow/block lists and auto-approval control who can register and whether new accounts are active immediately.
system_settings.docs_session_idle_timeout_desc: Defines inactivity timeout used by frontend session handling.
system_settings.docs_session_single_device_mode_desc: Forces one active session per user by limiting max active sessions to 1.
system_settings.docs_password_policy_desc: Password complexity settings are enforced during register/reset/change password flows.
system_settings.docs_login_security_desc: Lockout settings define failed attempt threshold and lockout duration.
system_settings.docs_mfa_policy_desc: Universal MFA enforcement and bypass IP list control when MFA challenge is required.
system_settings.docs_account_lifecycle_desc: Lifecycle fields define target policy values for inactivity and password rotation.
system_settings.docs_maintenance_ip_whitelist_desc: Whitelisted IP/CIDR entries can bypass maintenance restrictions.
system_settings.docs_maintenance_role_whitelist_desc: Users with any listed role can bypass maintenance restrictions.
system_settings.docs_email_delivery_desc: Sender identity and delivery limits define operational email policy values.
system_settings.docs_notification_login_alert_desc: Controls whether successful login alerts are sent to users.
system_settings.docs_notification_security_recipients_de: Stores distribution list for security-related notifications.
system_settings.docs_localization_default_culture_desc: Used as the application default request culture.
system_settings.docs_localization_fallback_culture_desc: Used as fallback chain entry when a translation key is missing.
system_settings.docs_localization_require_user_culture_s: Defines whether user culture selection should be mandatory.
system_settings.docs_audit_retention_days_desc: Mapped to audit log retention cleanup policy.
system_settings.docs_audit_cleanup_schedule_hour_utc_des: Background audit cleanup job executes on this UTC hour.
system_settings.docs_audit_pii_masking_enabled_desc: Mapped to security PII masking feature flag.
system_settings.docs_audit_capture_filters_desc: Choose which read, CRUD, other and error events are written into the audit log globally.
system_settings.application_name_desc: Displayed in page titles and footer areas.
system_settings.logo_upload_hint: PNG or JPG format, recommended height: 42px
system_settings.application_favicon_desc: Upload a PNG or ICO favicon file (max. 2MB).
system_settings.favicon_upload_hint: ICO or PNG format, recommended size: 32x32px
system_settings.login_enabled_desc: When disabled, all sign-in methods are blocked.
system_settings.register_enabled_desc: When disabled, new users cannot create accounts.
system_settings.google_login_enabled_desc: When disabled, users cannot sign in with Google.
system_settings.forgot_password_enabled_desc: When disabled, users cannot request password reset codes.
system_settings.change_password_enabled_desc: When disabled, users cannot change passwords from profile.
system_settings.session_management_enabled_desc: When disabled, users cannot list or revoke sessions.
system_settings.email_verification_required_desc: When disabled, users can sign in immediately after registration.
system_settings.email_verification_code_expiry_seconds_d: How long a verification code stays valid after it is sent.
system_settings.email_verification_resend_cooldown_secon: Minimum waiting time before requesting a new verification code.
system_settings.session_access_token_lifetime_minutes_de: How long API access tokens remain valid.
system_settings.session_refresh_token_lifetime_days_desc: How long user sessions can be renewed without logging in again.
system_settings.session_max_active_sessions_desc: When exceeded, oldest active sessions are revoked automatically.
system_settings.password_min_length_desc: The shortest password length accepted by register/reset/change operations.
system_settings.password_require_uppercase_desc: Passwords must include at least one uppercase letter.
system_settings.password_require_lowercase_desc: Passwords must include at least one lowercase letter.
system_settings.password_require_digit_desc: Passwords must include at least one numeric digit.
system_settings.password_require_non_alphanumeric_desc: Passwords must include at least one non-alphanumeric character.
system_settings.login_lockout_enabled_desc: After repeated failed sign-in attempts, temporarily lock the account.
system_settings.login_max_failed_attempts_desc: Number of failed attempts allowed before lockout starts.
system_settings.login_lockout_duration_minutes_desc: How long the account stays locked before retry is allowed.
system_settings.maintenance_mode_enabled_desc: When enabled, only admin users can access protected endpoints.
system_settings.maintenance_end_time_desc: Specify when the maintenance is expected to end. Shown as a countdown to users.
system_settings.account_force_password_change_on_first_l: Force password change on first login
system_settings.maintenance_role_whitelist_desc: Selected roles can access the system during maintenance.

email_templates.title: Email Templates
email_templates.subtitle: Design and manage templates used for outgoing emails.
email_templates.key_locked_hint: Template key cannot be changed after creation.
email_templates.body_help: You can use placeholders like Greeting and VerificationCode.
email_templates.fullscreen_shortcuts_hint: Shortcuts: Ctrl/Cmd+S save draft, Esc close modal.
email_templates.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this template?
email_templates.no_variables: No variables detected in current template.
email_templates.required_variables_help: Separate variables with commas. Save validates missing/extra placeholders against this schema.
email_templates.rollback_publish_confirm: Rollback this version and publish immediately?
email_templates.governance_disabled_hint: Template governance feature is disabled. Versioning, publish, rollback and validation actions are unavailable.
email_templates.documentation_intro: This section explains what each area in Email Templates does and when to use it.
email_templates.docs_library_template_list_desc: Lists templates for the selected culture and lets you pick one for editing.
email_templates.docs_library_culture_filter_desc: Filters the template list by culture. Empty means all cultures.
email_templates.docs_editor_key_desc: Unique template key used by backend notifications. It cannot be changed after creation.
email_templates.docs_editor_culture_desc: Defines which language/culture this template version belongs to.
email_templates.docs_editor_subject_desc: Subject template rendered with Scriban variables before sending.
email_templates.docs_editor_required_variables_desc: Defines required placeholders expected by template validation.
email_templates.docs_editor_body_desc: Main HTML/Scriban content of the email template.
email_templates.docs_editor_validate_desc: Validates subject/body and variable consistency without saving.
email_templates.docs_editor_save_draft_desc: Saves changes as draft and increments template version.
email_templates.docs_editor_publish_desc: Publishes current version for production email sending.
email_templates.docs_editor_delete_desc: Permanently deletes selected template and its versions.
email_templates.docs_preview_render_desc: Renders subject and body with sample values to preview final output.
email_templates.docs_preview_detected_variables_desc: Shows placeholders detected from current subject/body.
email_templates.docs_version_history_desc: Shows revision history and indicates which snapshot is published.
email_templates.docs_version_rollback_desc: Restores an old revision as draft or restores and publishes immediately.
email_templates.docs_test_send_desc: Sends a test email to the target recipient using selected template data.
email_templates.docs_test_published_toggle_desc: When enabled, uses published revision instead of current draft for test send.
email_templates.docs_translation_single_desc: Creates/updates target culture draft for only the current template key.
email_templates.docs_translation_batch_desc: Creates/updates target culture drafts for all templates in source culture.
email_templates.docs_translation_overwrite_desc: If enabled, existing target culture drafts are replaced.
email_templates.docs_coverage_missing_desc: Shows missing culture versions per template key.
email_templates.docs_coverage_draft_desc: Indicates cultures that still have draft (unpublished) versions.
email_templates.docs_governance_desc: When governance feature is disabled, validate/publish/rollback/version actions are restricted.
email_templates.intellisense_variable_doc: Inserts a Scriban placeholder into the template body.
email_templates.intellisense_placeholder_doc: Creates a placeholder in {{ VariableName }} format.

sample_values.verification_code_email_content: Use the 6-digit code below to complete your email verification.
sample_values.email_footer_ignore: If you did not create this account, ignore this email.
sample_values.reset_password_email_content: We received a request to reset the password for your account.
sample_values.reset_password_email_expiry: This link will expire soon. If you did not request this, ignore this email.
sample_values.email_support_text: If the button does not work, copy and paste the link into your browser:
sample_values.welcome_email_content: We are excited to have you here.
sample_values.account_security_secure_text: If this activity does not belong to you, secure your account immediately.
sample_values.account_security_review_text: If this activity does not belong to you, review your account security.
sample_values.login_alert_email_content: A login to your account was detected.

email_template_ab_tests.title: Email Template A/B Tests
email_template_ab_tests.list_subtitle: Manage active and planned template split tests.
email_template_ab_tests.form_subtitle: Set key, culture, variants and traffic split.
email_template_ab_tests.name: Name
email_template_ab_tests.traffic_help: Variant B traffic is calculated as 100 - A.
email_template_ab_tests.validation_required: Name, base key and culture are required.
email_template_ab_tests.validation_variants_different: Variant A and B templates must be different.
email_template_ab_tests.validation_traffic: Variant A traffic must be between 1 and 99.
email_template_ab_tests.feature_disabled: Template A/B testing feature is currently disabled.
email_template_ab_tests.read_only_hint: You have read-only access. Editing requires Email.Manage permission.
email_template_ab_tests.report_subtitle: Compare delivery outcomes for A/B variants.
email_template_ab_tests.no_report: Select a test and load its report.

audit_logs.title: Audit Logs
audit_logs.search_placeholder: Search service, method, user or payload...
audit_logs.id_not_found: Audit log record could not be found for this ID.
audit_logs.diff_empty: No diff data found for this record.
audit_logs.diff_disabled: Audit Diff Viewer is disabled by feature flag.
audit_logs.diff_not_comparable: A baseline record could not be found. Showing current snapshot.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_intro: These metrics show whether audit records are chained and tamper-evident.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_status_desc: Overall integrity health based on feature state, table availability and chain checks.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_total_desc: Total audit rows analyzed for integrity.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_hardened_desc: Rows that have integrity hash and chain metadata.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_missing_desc: Rows missing hardening metadata. Usually old data or partial write periods.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_broken_desc: Rows where chain/hash verification failed. Indicates possible tampering or out-of-order writes.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_last_hardened_desc: Highest audit log ID with successful hardening.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_broken_samples_desc: Sample IDs of rows detected as broken. Use these IDs for detailed investigation.
audit_logs.hardening_docs_missing_samples_desc: Sample IDs that currently have no hardening chain record. Click an ID to filter and inspect details.
audit_logs.hardening_disabled_hint: Audit hardening is disabled. Logs continue, but integrity chain records are not written.
audit_logs.hardening_table_missing_hint: Integrity table is missing. Apply latest database migration to start chain writes.
audit_logs.hardening_unavailable: Integrity summary could not be loaded.

alert_keys.high_errors_last_hour: High error rate detected in the last hour.
alert_keys.high_deletes_last_hour: High delete activity detected in the last hour.
alert_keys.high_role_switches_last_hour: High role switching activity detected in the last hour.
alert_keys.audit.high_error_rate: High error activity detected in the last hour.
alert_keys.audit.high_delete_activity: High delete activity detected in the last hour.
alert_keys.audit.high_role_switch_activity: High role switch activity detected in the last hour.

maker_checker.title: Maker Checker
maker_checker.search_placeholder: Search by operation, module or user...
maker_checker.cannot_review_own_request: You cannot review your own request.
maker_checker.self_review_disabled_hint: You cannot act on your own request.

feature_flags.title: Feature Flags
feature_flags.subtitle: Enable or disable platform capabilities at runtime.
feature_flags.runtime_only_hint: Only Runtime flags can be toggled. Mapped/Planned entries are visibility catalog items.
feature_flags.read_only_hint: You have read-only access. Editing requires Settings.Manage permission.

advanced.engine_disabled: Advanced rollout engine is disabled. Per-flag rollout rules are not evaluated.

email_sendhistory.label: Email Send History
email_sendhistory.description: Track outbound email delivery attempts and statuses.

audit_alerts.label: Audit Logging
audit_alerts.description: Enable or disable audit log persistence.

data_backupexport.label: Backup Export
data_backupexport.description: Enable data export and backup endpoint controls.

integration_eventcatalog.label: Event Catalog
integration_eventcatalog.description: Centralized management for published platform events.

featureflags_advanced.label: Advanced Rollout
featureflags_advanced.description: Percentage rollout, targeting and scheduled activation.

compliance_auditloghardening.label: Audit Hardening
compliance_auditloghardening.description: Tamper-evident audit chain and signed exports.

localization_workflow.label: Localization Workflow
localization_workflow.description: Ownership, approval and lifecycle for translations.

email_templates_governance.label: Template Governance
email_templates_governance.description: Version policy, validation and release controls for templates.

platform_observability.label: Observability
platform_observability.description: Traces, metrics and logs with correlation support.

data_retention.label: Data Retention
data_retention.description: Automated retention and cleanup policy execution.

compliance_rolebasedapproval.label: Role-Based Approval
compliance_rolebasedapproval.description: Approval routing based on role and operation type.

localization_draftpublish.label: Draft / Publish
localization_draftpublish.description: Draft and publish lifecycle for translation resources.

localization_missingtranslationbanner.label: Missing Translation Banner
localization_missingtranslationbanner.description: Runtime visibility for missing translation keys.

compliance_auditdiffviewer.label: Audit Diff Viewer
compliance_auditdiffviewer.description: Before/after diff view for audited changes.

platform_scheduledjobspanel.label: Scheduled Jobs Panel
platform_scheduledjobspanel.description: Admin console for background jobs and schedules.

security_apikeys.label: API Keys
security_apikeys.description: Service account and API key authentication model.

platform_multitenant.label: Multi-Tenant
platform_multitenant.description: Tenant/workspace isolation and scoped data boundaries.

security_piimasking.label: PII Masking
security_piimasking.description: Sensitive data masking across logs and payloads.

platform_configascode.label: Config as Code
platform_configascode.description: Import/export platform configuration as source-managed artifacts.

platform_environmentpromotion.label: Environment Promotion
platform_environmentpromotion.description: Controlled promotion across dev, stage and production.

email_templates_abtesting.label: Template A/B Testing
email_templates_abtesting.description: Variant testing and comparative template analytics.

compliance_rulebasedalerting.label: Rule-Based Alerting
compliance_rulebasedalerting.description: Alert engine based on configurable operational rules.

platform_selfhealingactions.label: Self-Healing Actions
platform_selfhealingactions.description: Automated remediation actions triggered by system rules.

email_delivery_logs.title: Email Delivery Logs
email_delivery_logs.feature_disabled: Email send history feature is disabled.

compliance_terms.title: Compliance Terms
compliance_terms.list_subtitle: Manage published terms, privacy policy and cookie policy versions.
compliance_terms.read_only_hint: You have read-only access. Editing requires Compliance.Manage permission.
compliance_terms.form_create_subtitle: Create a new legal document version and optionally activate it immediately.
compliance_terms.form_edit_subtitle: Content, summary and active state can be updated for existing versions.
compliance_terms.form_locked: This form is locked because your account does not have Compliance.Manage permission.
compliance_terms.version_lock_hint: Type, version and effective date are locked after creation to preserve acceptance history.
compliance_terms.preview_subtitle: Review the currently selected document before publishing or activating it.
compliance_terms.no_preview: Select a terms version to preview its contents.
